_README: SYNTHETIC FIXTURES — NOT recorded from a live Finnhub response.

_blocker.why_synthetic: No FINNHUB_API_KEY resolves in this environment (checked keystore-first via account_manager.credentials, then env). A real fixture could not be recorded.
_blocker.probe: GET https://finnhub.io/api/v1/quote?symbol=AAPL with no token returned HTTP 401 {"error":"Please use an API key."}
_blocker.conclusion: The host is UP and the endpoint answers. The blocker is precisely a missing credential, not a dead host (contrast ClankApp, removed 2026-07-10 for a DNS-unreachable host).
_blocker.to_replace_with_real: Save a Finnhub key in the GUI (Settings -> Finnhub) or export FINNHUB_API_KEY, then re-record against the live endpoints and re-point tests/test_finnhub_source.py at the recorded file.
_blocker.risk_note: These payloads follow the documented Finnhub schema (https://finnhub.io/docs/api) but are NOT verified against live responses. Per CONTEXT.md, an unverified parser shape in a money loop is a known risk. Discovery ships DISABLED, so nothing trades on these until a real key is added and the shapes are confirmed against live data.

quote_flat._endpoint: GET /quote?symbol=KO — a deliberately quiet name, should score low in Stage A

quote_no_price._endpoint: GET /quote?symbol=DELISTED — Finnhub returns zeros for an unknown symbol

basic_financials_poor._endpoint: GET /stock/metric?symbol=WEAKCO&metric=all — should fail the quality floor

rate_limited.error: API limit reached. Please try again later.
